name: Luxury Chocolate Ring
recipeIngredient: mixed fruits & grated chocolate to serve
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat egg yolks and sugar until thick and pale.
2. Sprinkle gelatine over 4 tablespoons water in a small saucepan.
3. Grate the chocolate.
4. In a saucepan, heat milk and chocolate until gently boiling.
5. Pour into the whisked egg yolks and mix well.
6. Return to the pan and continue heating, stirring continuously until the custard thickens enough to coat the back of a spoon. Do not boil.
7. Strain the custard into a bowl and let it cool.
8. Heat gelatine gently in the remaining water until dissolved.
9. Stir into the cooled custard and allow to set.
10. Whip cream until soft peaks form.
11. Whisk egg whites until stiff.
12. Gently fold chocolate custard, rum, and whipped cream into the mixture.
13. Pour into an oiled 2 pint ring mold and chill until firm.
14. Turn out onto a serving plate and fill the center with mixed fruits and grated chocolate.
